title: encapsulate_ipv6 accepts arbitrary data without IPv6 header validation
close_reason: Fixed swap_remove ordering, added priority field to PendingPacket and updated tests/calls, improved DtnMessage::size with test adjustment, added IPv6 validation in encapsulate_ipv6, added length check in reply_echo_ipv6. All tests and cargo check pass. Followed no-comment, no-dead-code rules.
